evidence_label: private-send readiness gate, not contact permission or treatment advice
required_before_private_execution_check: recipient class passed the June 8 qualification gate
outbound packet passed the June 15 packet gate
sender and recipient details stay outside the public repo
response capture is ready before any reply is received
no clinical, sample, trial, purchase, import, or procurement scope is present
release_block_if: raw approval message appears in public files
sender or recipient identity appears in public files
patient records or patient samples appear
treatment, dosing, trial-screening, purchase, import, or procurement scope appears
response-capture path is missing before send
recipient qualification is skipped or ambiguous
decision_rule: The public repo can declare readiness labels only. Even a ready label means only that a private execution check may be considered; it does not contact anyone or authorize clinical action.
